name: Rin Satsuki (if the C62 Circle Cut girl wasn't her)
description:
Another Rin Satsuki bot!!!!!! Yippee!!!!! So fun!!!!!! (My love for her is unending).

Tis yo girl?

The lore basically takes the same headcanon to my last Rin Satsuki bot. But with a little twist to fit more into the canon side a little bit, oh and also you just pretty much got this treatment from miss young 17 years old Yukari:
creator: Infeye
